goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'worth house'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '1 people' and '4 nights' starting from 'monday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'bishops stortford' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 08:30' and should be on 'the same day as the hotel booking'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called worth house
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 4 nights starting from monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from bishops stortford and should go to cambridge
The train should leave after 08:30 and should be on the same day as the hotel booking
Make sure you get train ID and arrival time
